backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Invoice and InvoiceItem types with CRUD operations (create, get, getAll, markAsPaid, markAsUnpaid) stored in a Map, using a migration hook to handle schema changes.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old Invoice records (which had a taxAmount field) to new Invoice records by dropping taxAmount and setting total equal to subtotal.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two completed features — removing GST/tax fields from the Create Invoice page and from the Invoice Detail/PrintHeader components — to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Aditi Digital Studio Billing' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Dashboard, Invoice List, Create Invoice, and Invoice Detail, wrapped in a shared layout with Navigation, footer, and Sonner toaster.
frontend/src/components/InvoicePrintHead: Reusable print header component displaying the Aditi Digital Studio logo, name, and Virar address alongside an 'INVOICE' badge, with no GST fields.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceStatusBad: Small presentational component rendering a green 'Paid' or amber 'Unpaid' pill badge with a colored dot, supporting sm and md size variants.
frontend/src/components/LineItemsInput.t: Dynamic line items editor component with add/remove row functionality, inputs for description, quantity, and unit price, and auto-calculated per-row totals displayed in INR.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Renders the top navigation bar with brand logo, desktop nav links, and a mobile hamburger menu, highlighting the active route using TanStack Router state.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) via React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all invoices, fetching a single invoice, creating an invoice, and toggling paid/unpaid status via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes (amber/teal palette), and adds utility classes and print styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreateInvoice.tsx: Page component with a form for creating a new invoice, including customer detail fields, line-item input, validation, and submission via the useCreateInvoice mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying summary stats (total invoices, revenue, paid/unpaid counts) as stat cards and a recent invoices table, fetching data via useGetAllInvoices hook.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceDetail.tsx: Invoice detail page that fetches a single invoice by number, displays a printable layout with line items, and allows toggling paid/unpaid status.
frontend/src/pages/InvoiceList.tsx: Invoice list page with search, status filter, and sortable table of all invoices, linking to individual invoice detail views and invoice creation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Plus Jakarta Sans, Playfair Display), an oklch-based color palette (amber, teal, semantic tokens), border radii, shadows, and enabling typography/container-queries/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking version, architectural notes (no GST/tax), and a list of implemented features for the Aditi Digital Studio billing web app.
